name: ida-headless-mcp
description: Headless IDA Pro binary analysis via MCP - 52 tools for reverse engineering (functions, decompilation, xrefs, structs, IL2CPP / Flutter metadata import).

interface.shortDescription: Drive IDA Pro headlessly with 52 binary analysis tools
interface.longDescription: Exposes a headless IDA Pro instance over MCP: open binaries, run auto-analysis, list functions/imports/exports/strings, fetch decompiled pseudocode, traverse xrefs, edit names/types/comments, search bytes and text, and import Il2CppDumper or unflutter metadata. Each session is an isolated worker process so multiple binaries can be analyzed concurrently.
interface.defaultPrompt: Open the binary at /path/to/lib.so, run auto-analysis, then list functions that reference the string 'license_check' and decompile the largest one.
